context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Single Leg Mining Bonus Feature

### What Was Tested:
1. **Backend API /api/mining/status/{uid}** - FULLY WORKING
   - Returns single_leg_info object with all required fields
   - Fields: active_downline, total_downline, bonus_prc_per_day, bonus_prc_per_hour, max_users (800), prc_per_user_per_day (5)
   - All 7 pytest tests pass

2. **Frontend Mining.js** - CODE VERIFIED (UI not tested due to login issue)
   - Lines 1515-1538 contain Single Leg Bonus display code
   - Shows in Mining Speed Breakdown section
   - Displays: '{active_downline} active / {total_downline} total • Max {max_users} users'
   - Displays: '+{bonus_prc_per_hour} PRC/hr' and '≈ {bonus_prc_per_day} PRC/day'
   - Uses special gradient styling (pink/purple)

### Test Files Created:
- /app/tests/e2e/single-leg-mining.spec.ts - 7 Playwright tests (6 pass, 1 skipped)
- /app/backend/tests/test_single_leg_mining.py - 7 pytest tests (all pass)

### Known Issues:
- Login API (/api/auth/login) returns 500 error - prevents UI testing
- No data-testid attributes in Mining.js
